text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 
49 
PTNT_RSDNC_CD 
LABEL: 
Patient Residence Code 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates where the beneficiary lived when the prescription was filled, as reported on the 
PDE record. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: PTNT_RSDNC_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
PDE 
VALUES: 
00 = Not specified, other patient residence not identified below 
01 = Home 
03 = Nursing
